title: Where Will the Raindrops Go
lyric:
[00:00.000] 作曲 : TOFIE
[00:25.075]Grey mornings
[00:31.277]It's comforting,
[00:34.430]Yet it's bittersweet
[00:37.195]"Take a step"
[00:38.396]"Listen to your heart"
[00:40.418]"What's next?"
[00:41.550]"Is your fear of falling?"
[00:45.929]"Do you still hear it calling?"
[00:49.260]In petrichor
[00:52.433]This life that I chose
[00:55.176]In every song, a sense of longing
[00:58.967]Until it all unfolds
[01:01.056]E'er we go
[01:03.738]All of the rainbows I could know
[01:10.364]If the clouds would guide me home
[01:13.203]So let it fall
[01:14.838]Let it fall
[01:16.434]Let it wash it all, oh
[01:19.464]Ebb and flow
[01:20.986]Where will the raindrops go?
[01:24.331]Oh, oh
[01:25.642]Let it drip
[01:26.990]Let it drip
[01:28.551]Every bit by bit, surely
[01:31.525]I feel it now, in and out
[01:34.263]Let it release
[02:01.279]Good morning
[02:07.041]It's all in me
[02:10.334]Forgotten melodies
[02:13.036]Take a breath
[02:14.232]Open up your soul, and then
[02:17.254]Feel it all come pouring
[02:21.668]The strength to write this story
[02:25.065]Bask in the rain
[02:28.100]This life that I chose
[02:31.187]In every song, a found belonging
[02:34.540]Until it all unfolds
[02:37.028]E'er we go
[02:39.987]All of the rainbows I will know
[02:46.170]Oh, when the clouds will guide me home
[02:49.230]So let it fall
[02:50.951]Let it fall
[02:52.428]Let it wash it all, oh
[02:55.461]Ebb and flow
[02:57.115]Where will the raindrops go?
[03:00.084]Oh, oh
[03:01.430]Let it drip
[03:02.915]Let it drip
[03:04.286]Every bit by bit, surely
[03:07.446]I feel it now, in and out
[03:09.967]Let it release
[03:13.041]So let it fall
[03:14.899]Let it fall
[03:16.449]Let it wash it all, oh
[03:19.354]Ebb and flow
[03:21.057]Where will the raindrops go?
[03:24.481]Oh, oh
[03:25.522]Let it drip
[03:26.951]Let it drip
[03:28.064]Every bit by bit, surely
[03:31.168]I feel it now, in and out
[03:34.058]Let it release
[03:37.217]So let it fall
[03:38.958]Let it fall
[03:40.242]Let it all just go, oh
[03:43.438]Ebb and flow
[03:45.020]Where will the raindrops go?
[03:48.311]Oh, oh
[03:49.509]Let it drip
[03:50.975]Let it drip
[03:52.366]Every bit by bit, surely
[03:55.316]I see it now, in the clouds
[03:58.012]There is release
